item.title: Cards Against Humanity Un-fucks America
item.description:
https://www.apologize.lol/
https://www.apologize.lol/ Just like Mike Pillow who offered $1 million for anyone who could prove the election was secure, Elon Musk has opened the door to drain his coffers. How many people do we need to bankrupt him? https://petition.theamericapac.org/ Referrer is MuskIsDumb@cah.lol Why they are currently suing SpaceX: https://www.cahsuesmusk.com/

item.title: A Dutch supermarket introduced slow checkouts for lonely elderly people who want someone to talk to. The move has proven so successful that they have installed the checkouts in 200 stores. They have also added a ‘chat corner’ where locals could talk too
item.description: A Dutch supermarket introduced slow checkouts for lonely elderly people who want someone to talk to. The move has proven so successful that they have installed the checkouts in 200 stores. They have also added a ‘chat corner’ where locals could meet for a cup of coffee and a chat. Credit - original owner
item.dc:creator: Joyika

item.title: Ok, left lane campers suck. You only have really two choices. Try to safely pass on the right or you just sit your ass there and wait until they move. Don't risk people's lives by escalating the situation.
item.description: If you ride someone's ass like that you forfeit your fucking deductible asshole.

item.title: Freedom of Speech is not Freedom from Consequences
item.description: “Freedom of speech” means the government cannot punish you for criticizing it. Unlike say, Russia, who locks up and persecutes dissidents and activists. Or North Korea. That’s all it means. You can say, “I hate the president” and it’s not a crime. You are allowed to say that. “Freedom of speech” does not mean you won’t suffer consequences for what you say- it just means the government won’t arrest you for saying it. But even that has its limits. You can’t scream “fire” in a crowded building, or joke about taking a bomb on a plane. You can’t threaten to kill the president, or threaten to go shoot up a class of preschoolers. If your speech puts people in danger, you will be charged with a crime. Hate speech in itself might not get you arrested, but hate speech along with another crime will exponentially increase your punishment. “Freedom of speech” does not mean you can say whatever you want on private property- either real or virtual. It doesn’t mean people have to listen to or read your stupid thoughts. It doesn’t mean people have to overlook your bigotry, racism, sexism or other hateful attitudes. You have the freedom to say awful things. And other people have the right to block you or delete your ugliness. Freedom has never, under any circumstances, meant “not suffering consequences.” Freedom is the right to choose your path and face the consequences you have chosen. - MYRA SCOTT
item.dc:creator: AmarettosMommy

item.title: Also, pretty sure the past tense of biked is boke, but that’s a different issue
item.dc:creator: neospor1n
